metadata.title: Zenith - Master Your Discipline
metadata.description: Achieve your peak with zen-like focus.

hero.description: Build lasting habits with a proven streak system, interactive heatmap, and instant push notifications. One step forward, every single day.
hero.ctaNote: No credit card required · 30-second setup · Works on all devices

features.title: Everything you need, in one place
features.subtitle: No complicated apps needed. A clean, fast, and effective routine tracking experience.

smartTracking.title: Smart Tracking
smartTracking.description: Create daily, weekly, and monthly routines in seconds. Complete with a checkbox, see your progress instantly.

streaks.title: Flaming Streaks
streaks.description: Complete your routine every day and grow your streak. Streaks are tracked visually and you'll be warned before they break.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Examine your last 7 days' performance with interactive charts. Discover which days you're most productive.

heatmap.title: Interactive Heatmap
heatmap.description: See your consistency at a glance with a 365-day activity map. GitHub-style green squares that fuel your motivation.

pushNotifications.title: Smart Notifications
pushNotifications.description: Never miss a routine with Web Push notifications. Get reminders even when your browser is closed.

pwa.title: Always With You
pwa.description: Install as a PWA on your phone or desktop. Access your routines even without an internet connection.

gamification.title: Gamification
gamification.description: Earn XP, level up, collect badges, and climb the leaderboard. Building habits has never been this fun.

items.quote: When I saw the streak system, my motivation doubled in the first week to never skip a routine.
items.name: Elif K.

items.quote: I didn't expect such a powerful tracking system in such a clean interface. I use it daily.
items.name: Mert A.

items.quote: After upgrading to Pro, the weekly charts showed me which days I'm actually more productive.
items.name: Selin T.

cta.title: Create your first routine today
cta.description: Thousands of users use Zenith to track their habits. It's your turn.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know, right here.

items.question: Is the app really free?
items.answer: Yes! On the free plan you can create up to 3 routines, track streaks, and access from all devices. No credit card required.

items.question: What changes when I upgrade to Pro?
items.answer: Pro gives you unlimited routines, advanced weekly stats charts, priority support, and access to all future features.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Absolutely. All data is transmitted over encrypted connections and stored in secure cloud infrastructure. We never share your data with third parties.

items.question: Can I use it as a phone app?
items.answer: Yes! Zenith is a PWA (Progressive Web App). Use 'Add to Home Screen' from your browser to install it on your phone — it even works offline.

items.question: How do notifications work?
items.answer: With Web Push technology, you'll get reminders even when your browser is closed. You can easily toggle notifications on or off in settings.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Of course. You can cancel your Pro subscription anytime with a single click. You'll keep Pro features until the end of your billing period.

finalCta.title: Better habits are waiting for you
finalCta.description: Start today, feel the difference tomorrow. Thousands of users are already on the way.

layout.quote: Build better routines. Track every action. Stay consistent.
